description_long: This object is a square, wall-mounted stereo speaker system with a robust, industrial design. The front features a large, circular speaker cone set within a recessed, round frame, surrounded by a thick, square panel with subtle surface texturing and four small, circular indents at the corners. The speaker cone is protected by a radial grille with a central hub, giving it a mechanical, turbine-like appearance. The rear side is mostly flat with a slightly protruding cylindrical housing, likely for the speaker's internal components. The surface is a matte, dark gray-green color with faint linear markings and a weathered, utilitarian finish. No visible controls, ports, or branding are present on the exterior.
description: A square, wall-mounted stereo speaker with a large, circular grille and industrial, matte finish. The design is robust and utilitarian, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular speaker grille with radial spokes and a central hub, set within a square, textured panel.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the speaker's circular frame and the thickness of the square mounting panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel with a protruding cylindrical housing, lacking any visible connectors or controls.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view emphasizing the cylindrical back and the square panel's edge details.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Radial spoke pattern with a central hub, resembling a turbine or fan, set within a circular frame.
